recap:
- MLflow integrates with Unity Catalog to provide enterprise-grade governance for agent deployments by registering them as Unity Catalog models.
- Centralized governance includes version management, allowing for immutable snapshots of agent code and configurations for each model version.
- Lineage tracking is enabled, showing connections between models and upstream datasets, as well as feature store training flows.
- Fine-grained access control governs permissions for creating, reading, modifying models, and accessing resources related to agents.
- Models registered in Unity Catalog can be shared and discovered across multiple workspaces connected to the same metastore.
- Governed tags can be applied to models for standardized classification, enforcing consistent keys/values and assignment permissions.
- Reproducible deployments are ensured through immutable versions and captured environment dependencies, facilitating consistent loading and serving.
